Medioni"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$d1","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.07854","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/BaruchBKAM25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/BaruchBKAM25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/ben-baruch25a.html","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：数据剪枝在高剪枝率下往往显著掉点，因为被保留下来的子集无法完整承载原始数据分布的信息。过去的数据剪枝方法主要只优化‘选哪些样本’，训练时仍然只看硬标签，因此一旦子集太小，许多被删掉数据中的类间结构和暗知识就一起丢失了。","importance":"这项工作的贡献是把知识蒸馏系统地引入数据剪枝训练流程，属于数据级与训练策略级的结合。对 pretrain 的启示很明确：数据选择不是只有‘保留/删除’两种状态，被删掉样本的信息仍可通过 teacher 的软目标部分回流。对于大规模预训练中的 dedup、过滤、重加权和 curriculum，这个思路都值得重视，因为 aggressive pruning 的真正问题不只是样本数减少，而是目标分布被过度离散化。","technical_approach":"作者的方法并不复杂，但思路很扎实：先用完整数据训练 teacher，再在被剪枝后的子集上训练 student，同时结合真实标签和 teacher soft predictions。摘要提到他们先给出 self-distillation 用于 pruning 的理论动机，再在多种剪枝方法和不同 pruning fraction 上验证有效性。和传统数据剪枝相比，关键区别不是换了更聪明的打分函数，而是在子集训练阶段补回了被删除数据承载的相似类关系、难样本边界和不确定性信息。这样做有效，是因为剪枝本质上改变了经验分布；蒸馏则用 teacher 对全量分布的近似，把部分分布信息压缩回训练目标。代价也清楚：需要先训练 teacher，且 teacher 偏差会传给 student；如果 teacher 本身不强，蒸馏收益会受限。","experiments":"摘要明确声称：在不同数据集、不同剪枝算法和所有剪枝比例上，引入 KD 都带来显著提升，但没有给出具体数字。可确定的关键信息有两点：第一，收益不是绑定某一种 pruning 方法，而是跨方法成立；第二，收益在高 pruning regime 下尤其重要，因为这是传统方法最容易失真的区间。若看正文，最值得关注的实验应包括：不同 teacher 强度对恢复效果的影响、极端高剪枝率下与全量训练的差距能缩小多少、以及 self-distillation 是否已足够接近外部更强 teacher。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a common failure mode in data pruning: at high pruning ratios, accuracy drops sharply because the retained subset no longer carries enough information about the full training distribution. Most pruning methods focus on selecting which examples to keep, but training on the subset still uses only hard labels, so much of the class structure and dark knowledge from discarded samples is lost.","importance":"The contribution is a clean combination of data pruning and knowledge distillation. For pretraining, the lesson is broader than classification: data selection is not just a keep-or-drop decision. Information from removed examples can still be partially recovered through soft targets from a teacher trained on the full data. That perspective is relevant to deduplication, filtering, reweighting, and aggressive curation pipelines in large-scale pretraining.","technical_approach":"The method is conceptually simple and well-motivated. Train a teacher on the full dataset, then train a student on the pruned subset using both ground-truth labels and the teacher’s soft predictions. The abstract also mentions a theoretical motivation for self-distillation under pruning. The key difference from standard pruning work is that the paper does not only try to choose a better subset; it changes the objective on the subset so that information about inter-class similarity, uncertainty, and boundary structure is not completely discarded when samples are removed. This makes sense because pruning changes the empirical distribution, and distillation can act as a compressed proxy for the full-data target distribution. The trade-off is straightforward: a teacher is required, and any teacher bias will propagate into the student.","experiments":"The abstract makes one strong empirical claim: adding KD improves performance across datasets, across pruning methods, and at all pruning fractions, though it does not give exact numbers. Two points are still clear. First, the effect is not tied to one specific pruning criterion. Second, the gain should matter most in the high-pruning regime where subset-only training degrades the most. In the full paper, the most useful details would be how much stronger teachers help, how close the approach gets to full-data training at extreme pruning levels, and whether self-distillation already captures most of the benefit.","authors_note":""},"tags":["data-pruning","knowledge-distillation","data-quality"],"notable_authors":["Emanuel Ben Baruch","Adam Botach","Igor Kviatkovsky","Manoj Aggarwal","Gérard G. Medioni"]},{"id":"2507.04075","title":"Accurate and Efficient World Modeling with Masked Latent Transformers","authors":["Maxime Burchi","Radu Timofte"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$d2","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04075","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/BurchiT25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/BurchiT25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/burchi25a.html","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是：如何在世界模型里同时兼顾预测精度和训练效率。Dreamer 一类方法训练高效，但其紧凑 latent space 可能丢失对控制关键的细节；而更精确的像素级世界模型虽然补回了信息，却通常训练更慢，也难以让 agent 直接复用世界模型学到的内部表示。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于提出了一条折中路线：不回到昂贵的纯像素建模，也不完全接受过压缩 latent 的信息损失。虽然论文主要面向强化学习世界模型，但从 pretrain 视角看，它和 masked/latent sequence modeling 很相关：如何在离散或连续潜空间中保留足够可预测、可规划的状态信息，同时维持训练和 rollout 效率。这对视频 tokenization、latent dynamics、以及非 AR 生成建模都有借鉴价值。","technical_approach":"作者提出 EMERALD，一种 masked latent Transformer world model。核心不是直接从像素自回归预测未来，而是在潜表示空间里用 masked 建模学习动态，这样既保留比 Dreamer 更丰富的信息，又避免像素级建模的巨大成本。摘要强调它是‘accurate and efficient’的替代方案，说明设计重点应包括：使用较高保真度的 latent 表示、通过 masked 预测提升上下文利用率或并行训练效率、并让 agent 能消费世界模型内部表征而非只依赖重建像素。与 Δ-IRIS、DIAMOND 这类从像素训练 agent 的方法相比，它舍弃了端到端像素控制的纯粹性，换来更高的样本/算力效率；与 Dreamer 相比，它则牺牲了部分极致压缩，换取更强的状态保真。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体环境、模型规模和分数，但清楚给出了比较对象：Dreamer、Δ-IRIS 和 DIAMOND。可确定的实验目标是证明 EMERALD 在保持高效的同时，世界模型更准确，且最终 agent 性能更好。最值得关注的指标通常包括 imagined rollout 误差、下游控制回报、以及训练吞吐或样本效率。若有消融，关键应是：masked latent modeling 相比其他预测目标是否更优，latent 表示维度与控制性能之间是否存在明显 trade-off，以及 agent 直接利用世界模型中间表示能否带来稳定收益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a familiar trade-off in world models: Dreamer-style approaches are efficient, but their compressed latent states can discard information that matters for control, while more accurate pixel-level world models recover detail at a much higher training cost. The question is how to get both strong predictive fidelity and practical efficiency.","importance":"The contribution is important as a modeling trade-off rather than a pure benchmark win. Although framed in reinforcement learning, it is relevant to pretraining because it sits at the intersection of latent sequence modeling, masked prediction, and efficient dynamics learning. The broader lesson is that a latent model can be both trainable and useful for planning if the representation is rich enough and the objective is chosen carefully.","technical_approach":"The method, EMERALD, is a masked latent Transformer world model. Instead of autoregressively predicting future pixels, it models dynamics in latent space with a masked objective, aiming to preserve more information than highly compressed latent models while avoiding the heavy cost of full pixel-level modeling. The design likely relies on higher-fidelity latent states, parallelizable masked prediction, and a training setup where the agent can benefit directly from the world model’s internal representations rather than only reconstructed observations. Relative to pixel-based approaches such as Delta-IRIS and DIAMOND, this gives up some end-to-end purity for efficiency. Relative to Dreamer, it gives up some compression in exchange for better state fidelity.","experiments":"The abstract names Dreamer, Delta-IRIS, and DIAMOND as reference points, but it does not provide environments, model sizes, or numerical gains. The intended empirical claim is clear: EMERALD should produce a more accurate world model than Dreamer while remaining more efficient than pixel-heavy alternatives, and that should translate into better downstream control. The most informative metrics would be rollout accuracy in imagination, final return, and training or sample efficiency. Useful ablations would test the masked latent objective against alternative prediction targets, characterize the trade-off between latent dimensionality and control performance, and measure whether exposing the agent to internal world-model representations really helps.","authors_note":""},"tags":["masked-modeling","latent-transformer","world-model"],"notable_authors":["Maxime Burchi","Radu Timofte"]},{"id":"2407.11867","title":"Targeted Unlearning with Single Layer Unlearning Gradient","authors":["Zikui Cai","Yaoteng Tan","M. To address these limitations, we propose using future event prediction as a continuous evaluation method to assess LLMs'temporal generalization and forecasting abilities. Our findings reveal that as pre-training data becomes outdated, LLM performance degrades over time. Yet, in machine learning practice, there are many scenarios where such conflict does not take place. Recent findings from multi-task learning, reinforcement learning, and LLMs training show that diverse related tasks can enhance performance across objectives simultaneously. Despite this evidence, such phenomenon has not been examined from an optimization perspective. This leads to a lack of generic gradient-based methods that can scale to scenarios with a large number of related objectives. To address this gap, we introduce the Aligned Multi-Objective Optimization framework, propose new algorithms for this setting, and provide theoretical guarantees of their superior performance compared to naive approaches.","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.14096","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/EfroniK0BZU25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/EfroniK0BZU25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/efroni25a.html","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：多目标优化并不总是“目标冲突、找 Pareto 前沿”，在很多 ML 训练里目标是相关且可同时提升的，但缺少能在“大量相关目标”下可扩展的通用梯度方法。以往方法往往要求手动权衡或假设冲突结构，难以解释多任务/LLM 训练里常见的“互相促进”。","importance":"贡献是提出“Aligned Multi-Objective Optimization”这一更贴近实际训练的优化设定，并给出相应算法与理论/经验支撑。对 pretrain 的启示是：把不同数据源/任务/奖励建模为多目标时，若梯度方向天然对齐，优化器应当利用这种对齐结构来提升样本效率与稳定性，而不是一刀切做加权和。","technical_approach":"核心思路是显式刻画“目标梯度对齐”（aligned objectives）的情形，并在此设定下设计新的梯度型算法，目标是在不需要用户调权重的情况下同时推进多个目标。与经典多目标方法不同，它不把重点放在冲突与折中，而是把“相关性/一致性”当成可利用的结构；边界在于当目标确实冲突或对齐随训练阶段变化时，算法需要退化到更保守的策略，否则可能出现对少数目标过拟合或训练震荡。","experiments":"摘要未提供具体实验域（多任务学习/强化学习/LLM 训练）、目标数量规模、模型大小、baseline（如 MGDA/PCGrad/GradNorm 等）以及提升数字。只能确认作者声称覆盖多任务、RL、LLM 训练等场景的动机，并给出新算法与验证；判断其对 pretrain 的直接价值需要看：在多数据配比/多损失（LM+对齐+辅助）下是否带来更稳定的 loss 曲线、更少的调参成本与可复现的收益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper reframes multi-objective optimization for ML practice: many objectives are related and can improve together, yet most multi-objective methods assume conflict and require explicit trade-off tuning, which does not scale to many objectives.","importance":"It introduces an “Aligned Multi-Objective Optimization” setting plus algorithms tailored to it. For pretraining, it suggests that when gradients from different data sources/losses are naturally aligned, the optimizer should exploit that structure to gain stability and efficiency instead of relying on a fixed weighted sum.","technical_approach":"The approach explicitly models the aligned-gradient regime and designs gradient-based methods that advance many objectives without manual weighting. Unlike Pareto-front-centric methods, it treats objective agreement as exploitable signal; the limitation is that real training can shift between aligned and conflicting phases, where overly aggressive alignment assumptions may cause instability or neglect minority objectives.","experiments":"The abstract does not specify domains, number of objectives, model sizes, baselines (e.g., PCGrad/MGDA/GradNorm), or numeric improvements. diffusion 的自回归外循环就更像语言模型的 KV-cache，而不是每次从头算一遍条件上下文。它不改变扩散目标本身，但显著影响长序列生成是否可落地。","technical_approach":"核心方法是提出带因果生成与缓存共享的高效自回归视频扩散框架 Ca2-VDM。设计重点不是重新定义 diffusion，而是把相邻 clip 视频扩散相比，关键区别在于它显式消除了重叠条件帧的重复前向；这类设计有效的原因很直接：视频自回归里最大浪费来自重复编码同一上下文，而不是去噪步本身。代价是缓存机制需要和时空注意力、条件注入方式紧密对齐，否则共享会失效或引入错位。","experiments":"摘要给出了最核心的实验结论：方法针对长视频自回归生成的效率问题，并宣称避免了随自回归步数上升的二次复杂度。现有摘要被截断，无法确认具体模型规模、数据集、wall-clock 加速倍数、显存节省幅度以及质量指标是否保持不变。读者应重点看三类结果：一是固定质量下的吞吐/时延改善；二是随着条件帧数和自回归步数增加时，复杂度是否从近二次变为更接近线性；三是缓存共享是否在长程一致性上引入质量退化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a concrete bottleneck in autoregressive video diffusion: repeated recomputation of overlapping conditional frames across adjacent clips. In existing clip-wise AR video diffusion, each new clip re-encodes context that was already processed in the previous step, making cost grow roughly quadratically with the number of autoregressive steps when long context is used.","importance":"This is mainly a systems-plus-modeling contribution, and it matters because it removes a major scalability barrier for the AR+diffusion paradigm. For multimodal pretraining and generative modeling, the key lesson is that clip-level diffusion can benefit from cache reuse in a way analogous to KV caching in language models. The diffusion objective itself may stay unchanged, but the feasibility of long-horizon generation changes materially once redundant context computation is eliminated.","technical_approach":"The method, Ca2-VDM, appears to combine causal clip generation with cache sharing across autoregressive steps. The main idea is not to redesign diffusion, but to reuse representations for context frames that persist across neighboring clips, so each new step pays mainly for newly generated content. The difference from prior AR video diffusion is explicit reuse of overlapping conditional computation. That design is effective because the dominant inefficiency comes from recomputing the same context, not from the denoising loop alone. The trade-off is implementation complexity: cache validity depends on how temporal attention and conditioning are structured.","experiments":"The abstract clearly claims improved efficiency for long autoregressive video generation and avoidance of the quadratic growth pattern, but the provided text is truncated before the quantitative results. Boning"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$e0","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.18865","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/GaoZZXB25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/GaoZZXB25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/gao25t.html","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：扩散模型里广泛使用的 guidance 在理论目标和实际实现之间存在错位。现有做法通常把引导理解为对边缘分布做缩放，但作者指出这个目标在理论上并不成立，结果是很多经验上有效的 guidance 其实是在用一个不严格、但凑巧有用的近似。","importance":"这是一个方法级但带一定范式澄清意义的工作。它的重要性不在于再发明一种特定条件生成技巧，而在于把 guidance 这类几乎扩散模型标配的组件重新用正确目标表述出来，并给出现有实现为什么有效、又为什么不最优的解释。对做 diffusion LM、图像/视频 diffusion 或 AR+diffusion 联合建模的人，这种目标层面的纠偏有价值，因为它影响的是整个条件生成链路，而不是某个数据集的小改动。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 REG，Rectified Gradient Guidance。作者先证明“缩放边缘分布”的经典目标无效，然后改为一个合法的“缩放联合分布”目标；在这个目标下，现有 guidance 可被解释为在“没有未来信息可用”约束下对最优解的近似。REG 的作用不是替代所有 guidance，而是作为一个通用增强项，把现有梯度引导向更合理的方向校正。这个设计有效的原因是它同时修正了目标定义和近似误差：前者解决理论不一致，后者改善实际采样路径。边界在于，如果原始条件模型本身很弱，单靠 guidance 校正通常不能补齐建模能力缺口。","experiments":"摘要只明确说在 1D 和 2D 实验上验证了 REG 的有效性，但未给出具体数据集、基线和提升数字。从论文定位看，实验重点应是：与 classifier guidance、classifier-free guidance 等标准方法比较；验证 REG 是否在相同采样步数下提高条件一致性、样本质量或 mode coverage；并用 toy setting 展示理论最优解与现有近似之间的差异。如果实验主要停留在低维合成数据，结论会更偏理论澄清；若有图像等高维结果，其方法影响力会更强。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a mismatch that has been largely tolerated in diffusion guidance: the theoretical motivation and the practical implementation do not line up. Standard guidance is often framed as scaling a marginal target, but the authors argue that this objective is theoretically invalid, meaning many successful guidance heuristics have been operating with a flawed target.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with broader conceptual value. Its importance is not just another conditional generation trick, but a cleanup of one of the most widely used components in diffusion modeling. For diffusion LM, image or video diffusion, and hybrid AR+diffusion systems, this matters because it touches the objective behind conditioning itself, not a narrow benchmark tweak.","technical_approach":"The proposed method is REG, Rectified Gradient Guidance. The paper first replaces the invalid scaled-marginal objective with a valid scaled-joint objective, and then shows that standard guidance implementations can be interpreted as approximations to an intractable optimum under a no-future-foresight constraint. REG is designed as a plug-in correction to existing guidance methods rather than a full replacement. The reason this can work is straightforward: it fixes both the target and the approximation direction. The limit is also clear: if the base conditional model is poor, guidance correction alone cannot recover missing modeling capacity.","experiments":"The abstract only confirms effectiveness on 1D and 2D settings and does not provide benchmark names or numerical gains. The critical evidence to look for is comparison against classifier and classifier-free guidance, behavior at fixed sampling budgets, and whether REG improves conditional fidelity without collapsing diversity. Many interpretability methods analyze geometry or clustering one layer at a time and then aggregate afterward, which misses when a structure emerges, how long it persists, and where it disappears.","importance":"This is an interpretability and mechanistic-analysis contribution, closer to a new lens than a new training method. Its value is in offering a cross-layer description of how prompts and token representations are reorganized through depth. The direct impact on pretraining is limited, but it can be useful for comparing representational dynamics across model families, tasks, and prompting regimes.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to use zigzag persistence from topological data analysis to track topological features across layers. Instead of measuring each layer separately and summarizing afterward, the method follows the full lifespan of features such as p-dimensional holes as representations transform. This makes sense because hidden states evolve through continuous restructuring, and persistence can capture stable organization better than per-layer statistics. The trade-off is interpretability: topological features are descriptive but not cleanly mapped to specific semantic functions.","experiments":"The abstract indicates a statistical analysis of how prompts are rearranged across layers, but it does not specify models, tasks, datasets, or quantitative findings. The most informative experiments would test whether the proposed descriptors are stable across prompts and architectures, whether they align with known functional layer roles, and whether they correlate with behavior or errors. Without that link, the work is best read as a diagnostic framework rather than a training prescription.","authors_note":""},"tags":["interpretability","topology","llm","representation","analysis"]},{"id":"2502.17254","title":"REINFORCE Adversarial Attacks on Large Language Models: An Adaptive, Distributional, and Semantic Objective","authors":["Simon Geisler","Tom Wollschläger","M. H. I. Abdalla","Vincent Cohen-Addad","Johannes Gasteiger","Stephan Günnemann"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$e2","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.17254","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/GeislerWACGG25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/GeislerWACGG25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/geisler25a.html","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作指出，很多针对 LLM 的优化式越狱攻击其实优化错了目标。现有方法常把“让模型高概率接某句肯定式有害开头”当作攻击目标，但模型即便对这句前缀打高分，也未必会继续生成真正有害内容，所以如果用这类目标的失败率来衡量鲁棒性，往往会高估模型安全性。","importance":"这是安全方向的工作，但其价值不只是攻击更强，而是重新定义攻击目标应如何贴近模型真实输出分布和语义结果。对训练研究的启示在于：无论做对齐还是做 robustness 评估，如果训练/评估目标和最终行为之间有代理偏差，结论就可能失真。这和 reward hacking、代理目标错配是同一类问题。","technical_approach":"核心方法是用 REINFORCE 做一种自适应、分布式、语义级的对抗攻击目标。相比手工指定 affirmative response 前缀，这里不再把单一表面字符串当成成功代理，而是直接针对模型输出分布及其语义有害性优化，从而更贴近真正的攻击成功事件。这样设计的好处是攻击目标能适配不同模型的偏好，不被某个固定模板绑死。代价是 REINFORCE 方差通常较高，语义目标的定义也依赖判别器或评估器质量。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体模型名单、攻击成功率和相对基线提升幅度，但它明确声称：传统 affirmative objective 会系统性低估可攻击性，新方法能更准确地逼近真实有害输出风险。读者应重点看三类结果：第一，在多个开源/闭源模型上的 attack success rate 对比；第二，固定查询预算下，新目标相对旧目标提升多少；第三，语义级目标是否会牺牲攻击可迁移性或引入过强评估器偏差。如果这些都成立，这篇论文的结论会比“又一个更强 attack”更值得重视。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper argues that many optimization-based jailbreak attacks optimize the wrong proxy. A common objective is to maximize the likelihood of a handcrafted affirmative harmful prefix, but a model can assign high probability to that prefix and still fail to continue with an actually harmful response. As a result, low success under that objective can substantially overstate robustness.","importance":"This is a safety paper, but its broader value is about objective design. The key contribution is not just a stronger attack, but a better alignment between the optimization target and the behavior we actually care about. For training researchers, this connects directly to reward hacking and proxy mismatch: if the surrogate objective is poor, both robustness claims and alignment conclusions become unreliable.","technical_approach":"The method uses REINFORCE to optimize an adaptive, distributional, and semantic attack objective. Instead of locking onto a manually chosen affirmative prefix, it targets the response distribution and semantic harmfulness more directly. That makes the attack model-specific and less brittle to stylistic preferences in the target model. The trade-off is standard for policy-gradient methods: higher variance, and dependence on the quality of the semantic evaluator used to score attacks.","experiments":"The abstract does not provide exact models, attack success rates, or gain margins, but it clearly claims that affirmative-response objectives systematically underestimate attackability and that the proposed objective produces stronger and more faithful attacks. The most important evidence will be attack success under fixed query budgets, cross-model generality, and whether the semantic objective introduces evaluator bias or reduces transferability. J. Reeve"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Score matching is a vital tool for learning the distribution of data with applications across many areas including diffusion processes, energy based modelling, and graphical model estimation. Despite all these applications, little work explores its use when data is incomplete. We address this by adapting score matching (and its major extensions) to work with missing data in a flexible setting where data can be partially missing over any subset of the coordinates. We provide two separate score matching variations for general use, an importance weighting (IW) approach, and a variational approach. We provide finite sample bounds for our IW approach in finite domain settings and show it to have especially strong performance in small sample lower dimensional cases. Complementing this, we show our variational approach to be strongest in more complex high-dimensional settings which we demonstrate on graphical model estimation tasks on both real and simulated data.","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"oral","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.00557","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/GivensLR25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/GivensLR25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/givens25a.html","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：score matching 在数据缺失时几乎没有成熟通用方案，而现实数据常常在任意坐标子集上部分缺失。由于 diffusion、energy-based modeling 和图模型估计都依赖 score matching，缺失值问题如果处理不好，这些方法要么只能先做插补，要么只能在很受限的缺失模式下工作。","importance":"这是一篇基础方法论文，重要性在于把 score matching 从“默认完整观测”的理想设定推进到更现实的数据条件。它对 pretrain 的直接作用不是立刻提升大模型效果，但对 diffusion 建模、EBM 以及潜在变量建模都有通用意义。尤其在多模态和真实日志数据中，缺失是常态，不是例外；因此一个能在任意坐标缺失下工作的 score matching 框架有较广泛的基础价值。","technical_approach":"作者提出了两类可泛用的缺失数据 score matching 变体：importance weighting（IW）方法和 variational 方法。IW 路线更直接，通过重加权恢复目标的无偏或可控估计，并在有限域设定下给出有限样本界；variational 路线则更适合更一般或更复杂的场景。这样的双路线设计很合理：IW 往往在低维、小样本时统计效率更好，但可能受权重方差限制；variational 方法灵活性更强，却通常引入优化近似误差。论文的价值就在于把这两个取舍讲清楚，而不是只给一个万能公式。","experiments":"摘要里最明确的实验结论是：IW 方法在小样本、低维场景下表现尤其强。除此之外，摘要没有给出具体任务、数据集或误差数值。对这篇论文，最关键的实验不是追求大规模 benchmark，而是验证不同缺失模式、不同维度和不同样本量下，IW 与 variational 各自的适用区间；以及与先插补再 score matching、或其他不完整数据密度估计方法相比的优劣。如果这些实验覆盖充分，这篇工作会是一个很实用的基础工具。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a basic but underexplored issue: score matching is usually derived for fully observed data, while real datasets often have arbitrary partial missingness across coordinates. In multimodal and real-world data pipelines, missingness is common rather than exceptional, so a general treatment has clear practical value.","technical_approach":"The paper proposes two flexible score-matching variants for missing data: an importance-weighting approach and a variational approach. The split is sensible. Importance weighting is often attractive when low-dimensional, small-sample settings make variance manageable, and the paper backs it with finite-sample bounds in finite domains. The variational route is more general and likely more scalable to harder settings, but it typically pays with approximation and optimization error. The strength of the paper is that it does not pretend one method dominates everywhere.","experiments":"The clearest result stated in the abstract is that the importance-weighting approach performs especially well in small-sample, low-dimensional regimes. The abstract does not provide datasets, metrics, or margins. For a paper like this, the most important experiments are phase-diagram style comparisons across missingness patterns, dimensionality, and sample size, as well as baselines such as imputation-plus-score-matching or other density-estimation methods for incomplete data. These timing differences introduce the risk of side-channel timing attacks. For example, if the cache is shared across users, an attacker could identify cached prompts from fast API response times to learn information about other users'prompts. Because prompt caching may cause privacy leakage, transparency around the caching policies of API providers is important. To this end, we develop and conduct statistical audits to detect prompt caching in real-world LLM API providers. We detect global cache sharing across users in seven API providers, including OpenAI, resulting in potential privacy leakage about users'prompts. Lei"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$e8","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.02086","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/HouCWYWDPCL25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/HouCWYWDPCL25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/hou25b.html","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是结构化剪枝的静态性问题：传统 pruning 训练出一个固定子网络，默认所有输入共用同一套激活参数，但 instruction-following LLM 的任务分布高度异质，不同指令真正需要的子电路并不相同。固定 mask 的结果通常是平均意义上可接受，但对具体任务既不够高效，也牺牲性能。","importance":"这项工作的贡献属于方法级和系统级之间，对 pretrain 本身不是直接改造，但对 posttrain 到部署的接口很有参考价值。它传递出的更一般结论是：LLM 的参数冗余是输入条件相关的，不是全局常数；如果这一点成立，那么以后做压缩、MoE 路由、甚至 continual specialization，都可能更应该做 condition-aware 的稀疏化，而不是一次性全局裁剪。","technical_approach":"作者提出 instruction-following pruning，本质上是一种动态结构化剪枝：不再为整个模型学习一个固定 mask，而是训练一个稀疏 mask predictor，输入用户指令，预测当前任务最相关的参数子集，并只激活这些结构化单元。关键设计点有两个。第一，它不是 token-level 的细粒度动态计算，而是围绕 instruction 条件做较稳定的结构化选择，因此推理实现上比非结构化稀疏更现实。第二，它要解决“怎么知道哪些参数和该指令相关”的识别问题，说明论文大概率设计了某种重要性学习或监督信号来训练 predictor。与静态 pruning 相比，它牺牲了额外控制开销和更复杂的 serving 路径，换来任务自适应的性能/效率折中。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验结论是：作者认为动态、指令条件化的结构化剪枝能比传统静态剪枝更有效地在不同任务上选择参数子集。摘要没有给出具体模型规模、剪枝比例、吞吐提升、时延数据或与训练同尺寸小模型 from scratch 的对比数字，因此无法写出定量收益。评估这类工作的关键事实通常应包括：1）在相同稀疏率下，对 instruction-following benchmark 的平均精度是否显著优于静态剪枝；2）mask predictor 的额外开销是否吃掉大部分推理收益；3）task heterogeneity 越强时，动态剪枝相对静态剪枝的优势是否更明显；4）是否存在分布外指令导致 mask 失配的问题。没有这些数字前，可以把它视为“条件化子网络选择”在 LLM 压缩中的一个自然演化方向。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a simple but important mismatch in structured pruning: static pruning assumes one subnetwork works well for all inputs, while instruction-following LLMs serve highly heterogeneous tasks. A single fixed mask is therefore efficient only on average and often suboptimal for any given instruction.","importance":"This is a method/systems contribution rather than a pretraining recipe, but it has useful implications for the pretrain-to-deployment interface. The broader message is that parameter redundancy in LLMs is input-dependent, not a global constant. If that view is right, future pruning, specialization, and even MoE-style routing should be condition-aware rather than one-shot and static.","technical_approach":"The proposed instruction-following pruning replaces a fixed structured mask with a dynamic one predicted from the user instruction. A sparse mask predictor selects the most relevant structured parameters for the current task, activating only that subnetwork at inference. Two design choices matter here. First, the adaptation is conditioned on the instruction, not on every token, so it is more practical than extremely fine-grained dynamic sparsity. Second, the method needs a way to learn which parameters matter for which instruction, so the paper likely includes an importance-learning mechanism or supervision signal for training the predictor. Compared with static pruning, it adds control overhead and serving complexity in exchange for better task-specific efficiency.","experiments":"What can be confirmed from the abstract is the qualitative claim: dynamic, instruction-conditioned structured pruning is more effective than traditional static pruning for selecting useful parameters across tasks. The abstract does not provide model sizes, sparsity levels, latency/throughput numbers, or exact benchmark gains, so quantitative claims cannot be made here. The critical evidence to look for is whether it wins at matched sparsity, whether predictor overhead preserves net speedup, whether the gap grows with task heterogeneity, and how brittle the routing is on out-of-distribution instructions.","authors_note":""},"tags":["pruning","instruction-tuning","compression","efficiency","alignment"]},{"id":"2410.00193","title":"Do Vision-Language Models Really Shan","Tao Xie"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$ea","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.15332","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/HuHWWHZFCS025","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/HuHWWHZFCS025","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/hu25j.html","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是 context caching 的一个现实瓶颈：现有 KV cache 复用通常要求请求之间有完全相同的前缀，因此在 few-shot learning、RAG 等场景里，即便核心文档内容相同，只要前面拼的指令、示例或检索顺序不同，就没法复用。问题不是模型不会算，而是 serving 系统把‘相同内容处在不同位置’当成了完全不同的上下文。","importance":"这项工作的价值是系统级，但对长上下文预训练和部署都有直接启发。它说明位置编码设计和缓存可复用性是强耦合的：如果模型表示严重依赖绝对前缀位置，那么服务层复用空间就被锁死。对做 pretrain 的人，这类工作会反过来提醒你，位置机制不仅影响困惑度和长度外推，也影响后续 serving 是否能做模块化上下文复用。","technical_approach":"作者提出 EPIC，用于实现 position-independent caching（PIC），核心目标是让某段 immutable content 的 KV 表示不再依赖其前面具体接了什么 prefix，从而可以跨请求模块化复用。摘要里说作者 formalize 了 PIC，并推进了 prior work，说明方法不仅是工程缓存策略，还涉及对位置无关复用条件的建模。关键难点是：标准 transformer 的 KV 明显受位置信息影响，不能直接平移复用；因此有效方案通常需要重参数化位置表示、校正注意力分数，或构建可组合的 cache 片段。和 exact-prefix caching 相比，PIC 的收益是大幅扩大命中范围，但代价是额外的索引、对齐和正确性约束，稍有不慎就会引入语义错位。","experiments":"摘要确认了问题场景和方法目标：在 few-shot learning、RAG 等存在共享内容但前缀变化的请求中，EPIC 旨在实现独立于前缀的 KV 复用。它还强调自己是在 prior PIC 工作上进一步推进，暗示可能解决了精度损失、适用模型范围或系统效率问题。由于摘要片段被截断，无法确认实验所用模型、上下文长度、cache hit 率、吞吐提升、TTFT/latency 降幅以及与 exact-prefix caching 或其他 PIC 方法的比较数字。评估这类工作最关键的是三点：1）在真实请求分布下命中率提升多少；2）复用后是否保持与原始推理几乎一致的输出质量；3）系统开销是否足够低，能把理论复用真正变成端到端收益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical limitation of context caching: standard KV reuse usually requires exact prefix matches across requests. That is too restrictive for real workloads such as few-shot prompting and RAG, where the core document content may repeat but the leading instruction, demonstrations, or retrieval order changes.","importance":"This is a systems paper, but it has direct implications for long-context model design and deployment. It highlights a tight coupling between positional representations and cache reusability. If a model’s intermediate states are too tied to absolute prefix position, serving systems lose a large amount of potential reuse.","technical_approach":"EPIC proposes efficient position-independent caching, aiming to make the KV representation of immutable content reusable regardless of the prefixes that come before it. The abstract says the paper formalizes PIC and advances prior work, which suggests this is not just a cache-engineering trick but also a statement about when and how position-independent reuse is valid. The technical challenge is obvious: standard transformer KV states are position-sensitive, so naive relocation is wrong. Any workable solution needs some way to re-anchor or correct positional effects while keeping cache fragments composable. Compared with exact-prefix caching, PIC greatly broadens reuse opportunities but introduces alignment and correctness constraints.","experiments":"The abstract clearly states the target workloads—few-shot learning and retrieval-augmented generation—and the intended gain: modular KV reuse even when prefixes differ. The key evidence to inspect is real-world hit-rate uplift, fidelity relative to uncached inference, and whether system overhead is low enough to convert theoretical reuse into end-to-end speedup.","authors_note":""},"tags":["kv-cache","serving","context-caching","long-context","inference"]},{"id":"2505.22002","title":"D-Fusion: Direct Preference Optimization for Aligning Diffusion Models with Visually Consistent Samples","authors":["Zijing Hu","Fengda Zhang","Kun Kuang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$eb","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.22002","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/HuZK25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/HuZK25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/hu25ab.html","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"DPO 用于对齐 diffusion model 时，正负样本之间视觉差异过大（visual inconsistency），导致模型难以学到真正影响对齐的因素——它分不清哪些视觉变化是因为对齐好坏，哪些只是随机噪声带来的无关差异。","importance":"方法级贡献，聚焦于 diffusion model 的偏好对齐训练。对 pretrain 研究的直接相关性有限，但对理解 DPO 在生成模型中的应用边界有参考价值——特别是当正负样本的差异维度远大于目标维度时，偏好学习会失效。","technical_approach":"D-Fusion 通过 mask-guided self-attention fusion 构造视觉一致的 DPO 训练样本对。具体做法是在生成过程中融合 attention，使得正负样本在整体视觉外观上保持一致，仅在对齐相关的局部区域产生差异。这样 DPO 训练时模型能聚焦于真正影响 text-image 对齐的因素。与直接用随机种子生成正负对相比，关键改进是控制了无关变量。","experiments":"摘要未给出具体数字。方法在 text-to-image 对齐任务上验证，需查阅全文了解具体 baseline 和指标。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"When applying DPO to diffusion models, the large visual disparity between well-aligned and poorly-aligned image pairs makes it hard for the model to identify which factors actually contribute to alignment versus which are irrelevant visual variations.","importance":"A method-level contribution for preference alignment of diffusion models. Limited direct pretrain relevance, but offers a useful lesson: when the difference between positive and negative samples spans many irrelevant dimensions, preference learning degrades. The solution of controlling confounding visual variation is generalizable.","technical_approach":"D-Fusion constructs visually consistent sample pairs for DPO training via mask-guided self-attention fusion during generation. This ensures positive and negative samples differ only in alignment-relevant regions while sharing overall visual appearance. Chua"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$ef","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.05628","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/JiangF0WM00C25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/JiangF0WM00C25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/jiang25b.html","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是：现有模型编辑方法很难稳定修改长形式知识，尤其是诗歌、代码、数学推导这类不能靠改单个 token 就完成更新的内容。过去很多方法默认“知识集中在某个关键 token 的隐藏状态里”，这对短事实编辑还凑合，但一旦目标知识跨多个位置展开，就会碰到作者说的 efficacy barrier：单点编辑无法保证全局生成一致。","importance":"这项工作的价值在于把模型编辑从“单点事实修补”推进到“长段知识重写”。对 pretrain 研究者，它提示了一件重要的事：知识在 LLM 里未必是一个局部可寻址的点，更像沿自回归轨迹逐段展开的条件分布。AnyEdit 因而不是简单提精度，而是在问题定义上更贴近真实知识更新需求，尤其适合 continual pretrain 与参数内知识维护的交界处。","technical_approach":"核心方法是一个新的自回归编辑范式：把长知识拆成顺序 chunk，迭代编辑每个 chunk 中的关键 token，而不是只修改一次隐藏状态。作者用互信息链式法则给出理论解释，意思是长形式知识可以分解成条件依赖的序列更新，因此分步编辑比单点编辑更符合生成模型的结构。这个设计有效的原因是它承认了知识更新是跨位置传播的，不再赌一次干预就能影响整段输出。和 MEMIT、ROME 这类参数编辑方法相比，它更强调 sequential consistency；代价则是流程更复杂，可能需要定义 chunk 粒度、关键 token 选择策略，以及控制误差累积。","experiments":"摘要明确说它在长形式、多格式知识编辑上优于强基线，但给出的截断信息没有具体数字。可以确认的是，评测场景覆盖 poetry、code snippets 和 mathematical derivations，这比传统 fact editing benchmark 更难也更贴近实际。论文值得重点看两类实验：一类是编辑成功率与泛化保真度，另一类是 sequential chunking 的消融，因为这决定收益到底来自理论上的分解，还是仅仅来自多次编辑机会。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a real limitation in model editing: existing methods struggle to update long-form knowledge such as poems, code, or mathematical derivations. Many prior editors effectively assume that the target knowledge can be changed by modifying the hidden state around a single token, which works only when the edit is highly localized.","importance":"Its contribution is meaningful because it reframes model editing as a sequential generation problem rather than a single-point intervention problem. For pretraining researchers, that matters: it suggests knowledge in LLMs is often distributed along autoregressive trajectories, not cleanly stored in one addressable spot. This makes the work relevant to continual pretraining and parameter-space knowledge maintenance, not just editing benchmarks.","technical_approach":"AnyEdit introduces an autoregressive editing paradigm that decomposes long-form knowledge into chunks and edits them iteratively through key tokens in each chunk. The theoretical justification uses the chain rule of mutual information, which supports the idea that long knowledge can be updated as a sequence of conditional edits. The design is sensible because it aligns the editing mechanism with how autoregressive models actually unfold content. Compared with one-shot editing methods, it aims for better global consistency, at the cost of a more involved pipeline and possible error accumulation across steps.","experiments":"The abstract states that AnyEdit outperforms strong baselines on long-form editing across diverse formats, but the provided text does not include concrete numbers. The important empirical angle is the benchmark choice: poetry, code, and math derivations are materially harder than standard factual edits. The most valuable experimental details will likely be edit success, locality/generalization trade-offs, and ablations on chunk decomposition.","authors_note":""},"tags":["model-editing","knowledge-update","llm"]},{"id":"2502.00722","title":"Demystifying Cost-Efficiency in LLM Serving over Heterogeneous GPUs","authors":["Youhe Jiang","Fangcheng Fu","Xiaozhe Yao","Guoliang He","Xupeng Miao","Ana Klimovic","Bin Cui","Binhang Yuan","Eiko Yoneki"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$f0","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.00722","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/JiangFYHMK0YY25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/JiangFYHMK0YY25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/jiang25c.html","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文回答的是一个很实际但常被粗糙处理的问题：在异构 GPU 环境下，LLM serving 怎样才能真正做到成本效率最优。过去很多系统默认用同构 GPU 部署，因为调度和容量规划更简单，但请求的计算/显存需求差异很大，结果就是要么高端卡被低负载请求浪费，要么便宜卡扛不住长上下文和大 batch，整体成本效率被拉低。","importance":"这是系统级工作，但对模型研究同样有启发。它的重要性不在于“异构 GPU 可以用”，而在于用系统性 benchmark 说明：不同请求类型与不同 GPU 的 compute/memory 特性存在可利用的匹配关系，服务成本不是单靠更好的 kernel 或量化就能解决。对 pretrain 研究者，这提醒我们推理侧 workload 结构会反过来影响模型架构和 KV/cache 设计的真实价值。","technical_approach":"方法上，作者先做全面测量，再决定 GPU 组成、部署配置与请求分配策略，而不是把异构资源当作简单混编。摘要显示其核心洞见来自 profiling：不同 GPU 类型在算力和显存上的优势不同，因此应根据请求特征——例如 prefill/decode 比例、上下文长度、batch 形态——做细粒度映射。这个思路有效，是因为 LLM serving 的瓶颈本来就随阶段变化；例如 prefill 更偏算力，长 decode 更受 KV/cache 和内存带宽影响。边界是这类策略依赖云平台价格模型与负载分布，结论可能不具备完全的跨环境普适性。","experiments":"摘要确认论文进行了 comprehensive benchmarking，并发现通过精细决定 GPU composition、deployment configuration 和 request assignment，LLM serving 的 cost-efficiency 可以显著优化，但这里没有给出具体提升数字。值得关注的实验点应包括：不同模型尺寸、不同上下文长度、不同请求混合分布下的最优资源组合是否稳定，以及与同构部署、静态路由、单指标优化策略相比的真实成本收益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical serving question: how to maximize cost-efficiency for LLM inference on heterogeneous GPUs. Lee","Hyun Oh Song"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$f2","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.07004","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/KimHPSLPLS25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/KimHPSLPLS25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/kim25d.html","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文解决的是 PTQ 里的一个关键缺口：现有量化方法要么没利用最终 loss 对隐藏特征重要性的指导，要么即使用了 end loss，也常把权重当成彼此独立处理，忽略同一输出通道内的交互。结果就是量化误差可能在局部看小，但沿网络传播后对真实任务损失并不友好。","importance":"这是一个方法级但很实用的改进。它的重要性在于把“量化误差最小”进一步改成“最终任务损失更小”，并且不是靠 full retraining，而是仍然属于 post-training quantization 范畴。对大模型部署有直接价值；对 pretrain 研究的间接启示是，很多推理效率优化如果不对齐最终 loss，就会高估局部重构指标的意义。","technical_approach":"GuidedQuant 的核心是把 end loss 的梯度信息引入量化目标，同时保留输出通道内跨权重依赖，而不是逐权重独立近似。这个设计有效，因为神经网络里真正重要的不是单个权重误差，而是误差如何共同影响下游表示和最终预测。相比只看 activation/weight 统计量的方法，它更 task-aware；相比简单 Hessian 近似或逐元素重要性打分，它更强调通道内结构关系。代价通常是校准阶段更复杂，对梯度估计和少量校准数据更敏感。","experiments":"摘要明确说 GuidedQuant 在三类场景上都稳定提升 SOTA 量化方法：weight-only scalar、weight-only vector、以及 weight-and-activation quantization，但没有给出具体模型、bit 宽和数字。可确认的结论是它不是只适用于单一量化设置，而是跨多种 PTQ 配置有效。最值得看的实验包括：低比特区间下的优势是否扩大、不同校准集大小的鲁棒性、以及与 GPTQ/AWQ 类 baseline 的真实差距。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a central weakness in post-training quantization: existing methods either ignore how hidden features matter to the final loss, or they use end-loss information while still treating weights too independently. That means a quantization objective can look locally reasonable yet still hurt the actual task after errors propagate through the network.","importance":"This is a practical method contribution. Its significance is that it makes PTQ more aligned with the model's end objective without requiring full retraining. For deployment, that is directly useful. For pretraining researchers, it is also a reminder that efficiency metrics based only on local reconstruction can be misleading when they are weakly coupled to end loss.","technical_approach":"GuidedQuant incorporates gradient information from the end loss into the quantization objective while preserving cross-weight dependencies within output channels. Compared with purely statistic-based PTQ methods, it is more loss-aware. Compared with simpler importance-weighted objectives, it better accounts for intra-channel structure. However, HiPPO fundamentally assumes data to be noise-free; an assumption often violated in practice. We extend the HiPPO theory with measurement noise and derive an uncertainty-aware initialization for state space model dynamics. In our analysis, we interpret HiPPO as a linear stochastic control problem where the data enters as a noise-free control signal. We then reformulate the problem so that the data become noisy outputs of a latent system and arrive at an alternative dynamics initialization that infers the posterior of this latent system from the data without increasing runtime. Our experiments show that our initialization improves the resistance of state-space models to noise both at training and inference time. The pretraining takeaway is that, for non-AR generation, model capacity may not be the dominant lever once post-hoc scoring and objective mismatch correction are strong enough; that would change how we allocate training and inference budget in diffusion LM style systems.","technical_approach":"The method is best understood as a two-stage recipe: a small one-step generator proposes candidates, and score post-training learns to identify the good ones. Instead of scaling the denoiser or increasing sampling steps, the design shifts complexity into a learned scoring function; the trade-off is less raw distribution modeling in the generator, but better latency and stronger task-aligned selection. Klindt"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"A recent line of work has shown promise in using sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to uncover interpretable features in neural network representations. Using compressed sensing theory, we prove that an SAE encoder is inherently insufficient for accurate sparse inference, even in solvable cases. Siddharth"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"We present Banyan, a model that efficiently learns semantic representations by leveraging explicit hierarchical structure. While transformers excel at scale, they struggle in low-resource settings. Conversely recent structured models have shown promise as efficient learners, but lack performance. Banyan bridges this gap with two key innovations: an entangled hierarchical tree structure and diagonalized message passing, enabling it to outperform larger transformer models with just 14 non-embedding parameters. It excels in low-resource settings, offering a viable alternative for under-represented languages and highlighting its potential for efficient, interpretable NLP in resource-constrained environments.","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.17771","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/Opper025","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/Opper025","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/opper25a.html","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：在低资源条件下，能否不用大规模 Transformer 也学到有语义性的语言表示。现有做法基本靠规模和数据量兜底，结构化模型虽然样本效率更高、也更可解释，但通常性能不够强，所以一直没有成为主流替代方案。","importance":"它的价值主要是方法级和范式提醒，而不是立即改写主流 LLM 路线。对 pretrain 的启示是，显式结构偏置在小数据、弱资源语言、以及强调可解释性的场景里可能仍有明显优势，说明“更大模型+更多数据”不是唯一有效路径；但从摘要看，它更像低资源表示学习的强基线，而不是可直接扩展到大规模基座训练的新标准架构。","technical_approach":"作者提出 Banyan，一个带显式层级树结构的表示学习模型，核心创新是“纠缠式层级树”加“对角化消息传递”。前者不是把树结构当成独立先验硬塞进去，而是让层级结构与表征共同建模，以避免传统结构模型表达力太受限；后者把树上的信息传播做成更便宜的近似计算，目标是保留结构归纳偏置的同时把训练和推理成本压下来。和 Transformer 相比，它牺牲了通用的全连接注意力，换取更强的结构约束与参数效率；和以往结构化模型相比，它强调既要效率，也要最终任务表现。","experiments":"摘要里最强的实验结论是：Banyan 在只有 14M 非 embedding 参数时，能超过更大的 Transformer 基线，并且在低资源设置下优势更明显。作者把重点放在参数效率和弱资源语言场景，而不是追求通用大规模 SOTA。可惜摘要没有给出具体数据集、baseline 名称、指标和提升幅度，因此目前只能确认它展示了“小模型借助结构偏置赢过更大 Transformer”的趋势，无法判断这种优势对数据规模、语言类型或任务类型的稳健性。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a clear question: can we recover strong semantic representation learning in low-resource settings without relying on large Transformers? Current practice mostly buys performance with scale, while structured models are often more sample-efficient and interpretable but usually underperform, so they have remained niche.","importance":"This is mainly a method-level contribution with a useful paradigm reminder rather than a direct replacement for mainstream LLM pretraining. For pretrain research, the signal is that explicit structural bias may still matter in small-data regimes, under-represented languages, and settings where interpretability is part of the objective; however, from the abstract alone, this looks more like a strong low-resource alternative than a scalable foundation-model recipe.","technical_approach":"The authors propose Banyan, a representation learner built around an explicit hierarchical tree structure. Its two key ingredients are an entangled hierarchical tree and diagonalized message passing: the first couples hierarchy with the learned representation instead of imposing a rigid external structure, and the second makes information propagation over the hierarchy cheaper while preserving the intended inductive bias. Relative to Transformers, Banyan gives up unrestricted attention in exchange for stronger structure and much better parameter efficiency. Relative to prior structured models, it is designed to avoid the usual trade-off where efficiency comes at too large a performance cost.","experiments":"The main experimental claim is that Banyan outperforms larger Transformer baselines with only 14M non-embedding parameters, with especially strong behavior in low-resource settings. The emphasis is on parameter efficiency and weak-resource language scenarios, not on broad benchmark dominance. We revisit guidance in diffusion models from the perspective of variational inference and control, introducing Diffusion Trajectory Matching (DTM) that enables guiding pretrained diffusion trajectories to satisfy a terminal cost. DTM unifies a broad class of guidance methods and enables novel instantiations. Grammar-constrained decoding (GCD) can guarantee that LLM outputs matches such rules by masking out tokens that will provably lead to outputs that do not belong to a specified context-free grammar (CFG). To guarantee soundness, GCD algorithms have to compute how a given LLM subword tokenizer can align with the tokens used by a given context-free grammar and compute token masks based on this information. Doing so efficiently is challenging and existing GCD algorithms require tens of minutes to preprocess common grammars. We present a new GCD algorithm together with an implementation that offers 17.71x faster offline preprocessing than existing approaches while preserving state-of-the-art efficiency in online mask computation.","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.05111","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/ParkZD25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/ParkZD25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/park25l.html","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：grammar-constrained decoding 在理论上能保证结构化输出合法，但实际部署时预处理太慢，尤其当 CFG 和子词 tokenizer 对齐复杂时，离线成本高到影响可用性。过去方法能保证 soundness，却常常要为常见语法花几十分钟做预处理，这使它很难进入高频生产场景。","importance":"这是系统级加算法级的实用改进。对 LLM 研究的意义不在预训练本身，而在推理约束接口：当结构化输出越来越常见，解码阶段的形式约束会成为模型能力的一部分。更快的 GCD 让我们更容易把 base model 接到代码生成、JSON/DSL 生成等场景，也让 tokenizer 与 formal grammar 的耦合问题从小众工程细节变成值得单独优化的方向。","technical_approach":"作者提出了一个新的 grammar-constrained decoding 算法及实现，目标是在保持 soundness 的前提下，大幅降低 CFG 与 subword tokenizer 对齐的预处理成本。核心难点在于，GCD 不是只看词法 token 是否允许，还要判断某个子词前缀未来是否可能拼成语法合法串，因此需要同时处理 grammar 状态与 tokenizer 分词路径。新算法的价值在于把这一步做得更高效，而不是放松约束换速度。相比已有方法，它看起来是在编译阶段和 mask 计算阶段都做了优化。","experiments":"摘要给出了一个非常明确的数字：离线预处理比现有方法快 17.71 倍。这是论文最硬的结果，因为预处理正是 GCD 最主要的落地瓶颈。摘要没有继续给在线解码延迟、内存占用、适用语法种类或不同 tokenizer 下的稳健性，因此暂时只能确认它显著改善了 preprocessing，而无法判断端到端收益有多大。","authors_note":"作者 Timothy Zhou、Loris D'Antoni 可确认。Loris D'Antoni 在程序语言、形式方法和程序分析方向较有代表性，这与 grammar-constrained decoding 的研究背景一致。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a practical bottleneck in grammar-constrained decoding: soundness is achievable, but preprocessing is often so slow that deployment becomes unattractive. The hard part in GCD is that masking cannot operate purely at the word or token level: it has to reason about whether subword continuations can still complete to a grammar-valid string. However, the scalability of ICRL beyond toy tasks and single-domain settings remains an open challenge. In this work, we present the first steps toward scaling ICRL by introducing a fixed, cross-domain model capable of learning behaviors through in-context reinforcement learning. Our results demonstrate that Algorithm Distillation, a framework designed to facilitate ICRL, offers a compelling and competitive alternative to expert distillation to construct versatile action models. These findings highlight the potential of ICRL as a scalable approach for generalist decision-making systems. Code released at https://github.com/dunnolab/vintix","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.19400","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/PolubarovLDZTNK25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/PolubarovLDZTNK25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/polubarov25a.html","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"In-Context Reinforcement Learning（ICRL）让智能体在推理时通过试错学习，类似 LLM 的 in-context learning 但目标是最大化奖励。之前 ICRL 只在玩具任务和单一领域验证过，能否扩展到跨领域的通用动作模型是开放问题。","importance":"对 pretrain 研究的启示有限但有趣：Algorithm Distillation（将 RL 学习过程蒸馏进 Transformer 上下文）作为一种预训练范式，展示了 Transformer 能在上下文中学会 RL 算法本身。这与 ICL 的机制理解相关——模型不只是记忆，而是在上下文中实现了某种优化过程。","technical_approach":"提出 Vintix，一个固定的跨领域模型，通过 Algorithm Distillation 框架实现 in-context RL。核心思路是把多个 RL 训练轨迹（包含探索和改进过程）作为上下文输入，让模型学会在新任务上通过上下文中的试错来提升策略。与专家蒸馏（只学最终策略）相比，Algorithm Distillation 保留了学习过程本身。","experiments":"在跨领域设置下验证，证明 Algorithm Distillation 是专家蒸馏的有竞争力的替代方案。具体任务域和指标未在摘要中详述。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"In-Context Reinforcement Learning (ICRL) enables agents to learn via trial-and-error at inference time, but scaling beyond toy tasks and single domains remained open. The question is how to create a self-improving loop where search and model training reinforce each other.","importance":"Relevant to the pretrain-posttrain interface: SOAR demonstrates a self-play-style improvement loop—search generates training data, training improves search—echoing R1-Zero-style self-improvement but applied to program synthesis. A method-level contribution.","technical_approach":"SOAR alternates between (1) evolutionary search using an LLM to sample and refine candidates, and (2) hindsight learning that converts search attempts (including failures) into valid problem-solution pairs for fine-tuning. The useful insight is that activation quantization difficulty is concentrated in a low-rank, high-energy subspace. If that subspace is handled with slightly higher precision, much of the model quality can be preserved at small cost. For pretraining, the implication is that anisotropy and outlier structure in activations are deployment-relevant properties, not just analysis curiosities.","technical_approach":"ResQ combines mixed-precision quantization with low-rank residual preservation. This work challenges this belief. Motivated by research on blind image denoising, we investigate a variety of denoising-based generative models in the absence of noise conditioning. To our surprise, most models exhibit graceful degradation, and in some cases, they even perform better without noise conditioning. We provide a theoretical analysis of the error caused by removing noise conditioning and demonstrate that our analysis aligns with empirical observations. We further introduce a noise-unconditional model that achieves a competitive FID of 2.23 on CIFAR-10, significantly narrowing the gap to leading noise-conditional models. We hope our findings will inspire the community to revisit the foundations and formulations of denoising generative 的大方向一致。","technical_approach":"作者提出 Direct Noise Optimization，核心思想是在 diffusion 采样过程中直接优化注入噪声，而不是更新模型权重。它是 inference-time、prompt-agnostic、online 的：给定目标 reward，在每次生成时调整噪声轨迹，让最终样本朝高奖励区域移动。这样设计有效，是因为在 diffusion 里噪声路径本身决定了生成结果的落点；如果能在每一步利用 reward 信号修正路径，就能在不破坏原模型分布的前提下实现有针对性的偏移。论文还讨论了理论性质和若干变体，说明作者不仅做了工程技巧，也在分析何时这种噪声优化稳定。","experiments":"摘要给出的下游目标包括图像更暗、更高审美等连续 Existing approaches often require extra guidance models or parameter updates, which are costly and inflexible when objectives change. The authors move the alignment step entirely to inference time.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with broader implications for generative modeling. The key takeaway is that some alignment objectives may be handled by optimizing the sampling trajectory rather than the model parameters, which is especially appealing for diffusion models and fits the broader trend of test-time optimization.","technical_approach":"Direct Noise Optimization works by optimizing the injected noise during diffusion sampling instead of tuning model weights. It is inference-time, prompt-agnostic, and online: for a given reward, the method adjusts the noise trajectory so the final sample shifts toward higher-reward regions. This design makes sense because the denoising path determines where generation lands; if reward information can steer that path step by step, one can bias outputs without permanently altering the pretrained distribution. In this work, we aim to bridge research into lifelong knowledge editing to real-world edits at a practically relevant scale. We hypothesize that this attention dilution issue is an important reason for code generation errors. LLM 获得文本里很难学到的“物理感知”，尤其是通过声音体现出来的基础物理现象。过去多模态 LLM 更擅长语义对齐和描述性理解，但对多普勒效应、混响/多径、空间方位这类依赖真实物理传播机制的现象理解很弱，主要因为可控、成体系的训练数据非常稀缺。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在于把“物理规律学习”明确做成了一个音频预训练/对齐问题，而不只是做音频问答数据集。对 pretrain 研究的启示是：如果目标是让模型学会世界规律，单靠互联网共现语料不够，必须把可控模拟器、物理先验和表示设计一起引入；这类思路对语音/音频 LM、具身多模态模型、以及统一世界模型训练都更有参考意义。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 ACORN：用物理仿真器生成带明确物理因素控制的音频问答数据，再把能处理幅度和相位的音频编码器接到现有 LLM 上。它不是简单把 waveform 或 log-mel 喂给模型，而是刻意保留相位信息，因为多普勒、空间定位和多径现象里，很多可判别线索就在传播延迟和相位结构中；如果只看幅度谱，模型更容易退化成表面模式匹配。相比常规音频-LLM 拼接方案，这个设计更强调“声音中的物理结构”而不是“声音的语义标签”。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的关键实验事实是：作者构建了 AQA-PHY 数据集，并围绕多普勒效应、多径效应和空间关系评估物理感知能力；同时比较了引入相位信息的音频编码器与常规做法的差异。摘要没有给出模型规模、数据条数、主 baseline 名称和具体提升数字，因此目前只能判断实验重点在证明模拟数据 + 相位敏感编码能显著提升物理相关问答，而无法严谨判断其相对现有音频 LLM 的量级优势。边界也很明显：这类结果首先证明的是受控物理现象上的可学习性，离开放环境真实声音分布还有泛化距离。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a clear gap: LLMs still lack physical awareness, and sound is a practical channel to teach it. Prior multimodal LLMs are good at semantic grounding, but they are weak on phenomena such as Doppler shift, multipath propagation, and spatial relations because those signals depend on real-world physics and are poorly covered by existing training data.","importance":"The main contribution is to frame physical awareness as a pretraining/alignment problem over audio, not just as another audio QA benchmark. The takeaway for pretraining is concrete: if the goal is to learn world regularities, internet-scale co-occurrence is not enough; controllable simulation, explicit physical factors, and the right representation all matter. That is relevant beyond this paper, especially for audio LMs, embodied multimodal models, and unified world modeling.","technical_approach":"The method, ACORN, combines a physics-based audio simulator with an audio QA pipeline and an audio encoder that uses both magnitude and phase. This is an important design choice rather than an implementation detail. For Doppler, spatial cues, and multipath effects, phase and propagation structure carry discriminative information; relying on magnitude-only features would push the model toward shallow pattern matching. Relative to standard audio-LLM interfaces, this setup is more about preserving physical structure than about improving generic audio semantics.","experiments":"From the abstract, the key experimental facts are that the authors build AQA-PHY and evaluate on physical phenomena including Doppler effect, multipath effect, and spatial relationships, while also testing an encoder that incorporates phase information. It is not a paradigm shift, but it is useful for the checkpoint ecosystem.","technical_approach":"CALM combines localized parameter information with global task consensus instead of choosing one over the other. The key design idea is that task-specific details should only be retained where they align with cross-task consensus. If models are vulnerable to simplicity and relevance biases, then standard refusal tuning and surface-level safety filters are likely insufficient.","technical_approach":"The framework, ICRT, draws on two cognitive-bias-inspired mechanisms. First, it uses cognitive decomposition under a simplicity effect to make malicious intent easier for the model to process step by step. Second, it exploits relevance bias by reorganizing prompts so semantically aligned benign-looking pieces combine into harmful outputs. Unlike brute-force jailbreak methods, this approach emphasizes interpretable attack mechanisms. 的参数空间等价性不应只由 permutation symmetry 来刻画，连续的 rotation symmetry 也很关键，尤其对模型融合有帮助。过去模型融合常借助 MLP/神经元置换对齐，但 Transformer 的自注意力层结构更复杂，离散置换能利用的等价空间有限，所以融合效果常受限。","importance":"这更像架构几何与系统优化交叉处的工作，不直接改变 pretrain 目标，但对 checkpoint fusion、模型平均、continual pretrain 和低成本后训练都有潜在价值。重要性在于它把“参数对齐”从离散排列问题推广到连续变换问题，理论上能显著扩大可利用的等价解集合；如果实验扎实，这会让 Transformer 融合更稳定，也可能改善多阶段训练中的权重拼接与迁移。","technical_approach":"核心方法是提出 Transformer 中自注意力层的 rotation symmetry，并将其作为 permutation symmetry 的连续推广。直观上，作者认为某些参数矩阵可以在特定旋转变换下保持函数等价或近似等价，因此融合前不必只搜索离散 neuron/head 对齐，还可以在连续空间里做更细粒度校准。相比传统 permutation matching，这样设计的优势是搜索空间更丰富、表达能力更强；代价是连续优化更难、近似等价条件可能更脆弱，而且真正的函数保持往往依赖层间协同变换是否完整满足。","experiments":"摘要没有给出具体实验对象、模型规模、融合任务、以及相对 baselines 的数值提升，因此无法准确总结性能。能确认的是，作者声称 rotation symmetry 对 Transformer 模型融合有效，并强调它比离散 permutation 更具表达力。对这类工作，最关键的实验应该是：在 model soup、federated fusion、task arithmetic 或多 checkpoint merge 上，相对 permutation-only 方法提升多少；以及这种提升在同初始化/异初始化、同数据/异数据训练出的模型之间是否仍成立。现有信息不足以给数值结论。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper argues that permutation symmetry is not enough to characterize useful equivalence structure in transformers, and that a continuous rotation symmetry is important, especially for model fusion. Prior fusion methods often rely on neuron or head permutation alignment, which works better for MLP-like structure than for the richer geometry of self-attention layers.","importance":"This is best viewed as a parameter-geometry contribution with systems implications. It does not change the pretraining objective directly, but it could matter for checkpoint fusion, continual pretraining, model averaging, and other low-cost ways of combining training trajectories. The key reason it matters is that moving from discrete permutations to continuous rotations potentially enlarges the set of functionally aligned solutions available for merging.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to introduce a rotation symmetry for transformer self-attention layers, generalizing permutation symmetry from a discrete to a continuous transformation family. The intuition is that some parameter matrices can be rotated in coordinated ways while preserving, or approximately preserving, the represented function. This gives a richer alignment space before fusion than pure permutation matching. The benefit is greater flexibility and potentially better alignment quality; the trade-off is that continuous optimization is harder and the exact equivalence conditions may be more fragile if the necessary cross-layer transformations are only partially enforced.","experiments":"The abstract does not include the fused model types, scales, tasks, baselines, or quantitative gains, so there is no reliable metric summary to provide. The authors argue that the missing piece is not just more safety data, but an internal process that explicitly reasons about risk before deciding how to respond.","importance":"This is a post-training paper, but it is relevant to the pretrain-posttrain interface. Its main contribution is to shift safety alignment from outcome-only refusal behavior to safety-aware reasoning, which is more likely to generalize beyond seen attack patterns. For model builders, the broader lesson is that intermediate reasoning traces may provide a stronger alignment signal than final labels alone.","technical_approach":"STAIR combines safety alignment with introspective reasoning. The procedure first teaches the model a structured, safety-aware step-by-step reasoning process, and then improves it through iterative preference optimization on step-level reasoning data generated by the framework. The important design choice is to optimize over reasoning steps rather than only final answers, because many jailbreaks exploit a mismatch between constrained outputs and unconstrained internal reasoning. The expected gain is stronger robustness; the cost is dependence on the quality of reasoning data, plus the usual trade-off around exposing explicit chains of thought.","experiments":"The abstract does not report base models, parameter counts, dataset sizes, or exact benchmark scores, so there is no trustworthy numeric summary. Yao","Wenpin Tang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICML","year":2025,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/icml/Zhao0ZYT25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/icml/Zhao0ZYT25","_ee":"https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/zhao25f.html","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"从标题看，这篇论文要解决的是：如何用强化学习来微调 diffusion 生成模型，并且把连续时间 diffusion 中的 score 视作 action 来处理。这个问题值得做，因为 diffusion 模型的后训练一直弱于 AR 模型：AR 很容易接 RLHF / DPO 一类框架，而 diffusion 的生成是多步连续过程，信用分配和策略定义都更麻烦。","importance":"如果方法成立，这会是 diffusion post-training 方向的重要推进，而且和新型语言建模范式直接相关。它的意义在于把 RL 工具箱更自然地接到 diffusion 上，而不是硬把 diffusion 过程离散化后套用 AR 的做法。对离散/连续 diffusion LM、图像生成、甚至 AR+diffusion 联合模型都可能有启发，因为它触及的是 post-train 接口而不是某个特定模态。","technical_approach":"当前没有摘要，无法确认具体算法细节。但从标题可以合理推断，作者把 diffusion 模型在连续时间上的 score function 更新解释为一种动作选择，从而把微调问题写成 continuous-time RL。这样设计的潜在好处是：RL 目标可以直接作用于生成轨迹，而不必只在最终样本上做黑盒 reweighting；同时也更贴近 diffusion 的动力系统形式。关键难点则会是连续时间策略优化的稳定性、奖励方差、以及 score/action 映射是否带来可实现的梯度估计。","experiments":"没有摘要和实验数据，无法说明作者用了什么模型、什么任务，以及相对哪些 diffusion RL baseline 有多少提升。对这类论文，最值得看的实验通常包括：图像或离散生成任务上的 reward 提升、样本质量变化、训练稳定性，以及与 reward-weighted regression、policy gradient on denoising steps、DPO-style diffusion fine-tuning 的对比。当前信息不足，不能下数值结论。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Judging from the title, the paper studies how to fine-tune diffusion generators with reinforcement learning by treating the continuous-time score as the action. This is a meaningful problem because post-training for diffusion models still lags far behind autoregressive models: RLHF-style methods plug naturally into AR generation, but diffusion involves multi-step continuous dynamics with much trickier credit assignment.","importance":"If the formulation works, it would be an important step for diffusion post-training and is directly relevant to alternative language-modeling paradigms. The significance is that it tries to connect RL to diffusion in a native way rather than forcing diffusion into an autoregressive or discretized framework. That could matter not only for diffusion LMs, but also for image generation and hybrid AR-diffusion systems.","technical_approach":"There is no abstract, so the algorithmic details cannot be stated with confidence. The appeal of this view is that rewards can influence the whole generation trajectory instead of only the final sample. The hard part is likely optimization stability, reward variance, and whether the score-to-action mapping yields tractable gradient estimation.","experiments":"No abstract or quantitative results are available, so there is nothing reliable to say about model types, tasks, baselines, or gains.
